walkthru.name: Purchase Requisition to Goods Receipt — Buyer Guide
walkthru.description: Step-by-step in-app guidance for Purchase Requisition to Goods Receipt at Southeast Distribution Center

steps.title: Open SAP Fiori Launchpad
steps.content: Navigate to SAP Fiori Launchpad to access your receiving applications. Ensure you are logged in with proper credentials.

steps.title: Search for Post Goods Receipt App
steps.content: Enter 'Post Goods Receipt' in the search box to find the MIGO application for processing goods receipts.

steps.title: Open Post Goods Receipt App
steps.content: Click on the Post Goods Receipt (MIGO) app tile to open the goods receipt transaction.

steps.title: Select Movement Type 101
steps.content: Select Movement Type 101 for Goods Receipt for Purchase Order. This is the standard movement type for receiving goods against a PO.

validation.error_message: Please select Movement Type 101 - Goods Receipt for Purchase Order

steps.title: Enter Purchase Order Number
steps.content: Enter the purchase order number that you are receiving goods against. This will populate the line items automatically.

validation.error_message: Please enter a valid Purchase Order number

steps.title: Enter Goods Receipt Quantity
steps.content: Enter the actual quantity received. Ensure this matches the physical count and does not exceed the PO quantity.

validation.error_message: Entered quantity must match the actual goods received

steps.title: Select Proper Storage Location - SE-DC Requirement
steps.content: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: At SE-DC, you must select Zone-R (Refrigerated Zone) for perishable dairy items. This ensures proper cold chain integrity and temperature control at 38°F as required by site policy.

validation.rule: Storage location must match temperature zone for perishables
validation.error_message: For perishable dairy items at SE-DC, you must select Zone-R (Refrigerated Zone) to maintain cold chain integrity

site_specific.site_rule: At SE-DC, perishable dairy items must be received and stored in Zone-R (Refrigerated, 38°F maintained) for cold chain integrity and food safety compliance
site_specific.enterprise_default: Standard storage location selection without mandatory temperature zone matching

steps.title: Mandatory Quality Inspection - SE-DC Policy
steps.content: ⚠️ REQUIRED: At SE-DC, quality inspection is mandatory for all perishable and private-label goods. This checkbox must be selected to ensure product quality and compliance with distribution center policy.

validation.rule: Quality inspection is mandatory for perishables at SE-DC
validation.error_message: Quality Inspection is required for perishable and private-label goods at SE-DC

site_specific.site_rule: Quality Inspection is mandatory for perishable and private-label goods at GlobalMart SE-DC to ensure product quality, cold chain integrity, expiry date verification, and packaging condition
site_specific.enterprise_default: Enterprise default allows optional quality inspection

steps.title: Enter Quality Inspection Notes
steps.content: Document key inspection details including temperature at receiving, packaging condition, and expiry date verification. This information is critical for traceability and compliance at SE-DC.
steps.expected_value: Temperature at receiving: 36°F (within 33-40°F range). Packaging intact. Expiry date: 2026-03-01. Lot LOT-2026-0215-MK verified.

site_specific.site_rule: Detailed inspection notes required for cold chain traceability and compliance verification at SE-DC

steps.title: Post the Goods Receipt
steps.content: Click Post to finalize the goods receipt. This will update inventory and complete the receiving process.

steps.title: Verify Stock Update
steps.content: Navigate to Inventory Management (MMBE) to verify that the stock has been properly updated with your goods receipt.

steps.title: Search Material
steps.content: Enter the material number to query the current stock levels and verify your goods receipt has been processed.

steps.title: Filter by Plant SE-DC
steps.content: Select SE-DC plant to view stock levels specifically for the Southeast Distribution Center.

steps.title: Filter by Storage Location Zone-R
steps.content: Filter to Zone-R (Refrigerated Zone) to confirm the goods were properly received into the correct temperature-controlled storage area.

completion.message: Congratulations! You have successfully completed the Purchase Requisition to Goods Receipt process. The goods have been received, quality inspected per SE-DC requirements, and stock has been updated in the proper refrigerated storage location.
completion.next_suggested: Next: Consider running 'Invoice Verification Process' or 'Quality Inspection Follow-up' walkthrus
